summary: Konekt Surgical Fix Pack v137 - All 6 fixes verified. 20/20 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified via Playwright. All fixes working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 surgical fixes verified and working. FIX1: Admin orders show separate customer_name and payer_name columns. FIX2: Vendor orders have vendor_order_no, base_price, and status fields. FIX3: Orders and invoices have approved_by and approved_at fields populated after approval. FIX4: Vendor orders endpoint returns orders from vendor_orders collection with sales contact info. FIX5: Vendor orders API does NOT expose customer_name, customer_phone, or customer_email (privacy protected). FIX6: CustomerPortalLayout navigation uses /account/* paths, and /dashboard/* routes redirect to /account/*.

FIX1_customer_payer_separation.details: Admin orders at /api/admin/orders-ops returns customer_name and payer_name as separate fields. UI shows both columns with different values (e.g., Customer: 'Demo Customer', Payer: 'John', 'Mac Geofrey', 'Federica', etc.)

FIX2_vendor_order_creation.details: Vendor orders have vendor_order_no (e.g., '6248fb8b-4a7'), base_price (e.g., TZS 60,000), and status fields. Created at payment approval with status='assigned'.

FIX3_approval_fields.details: Orders and invoices have approved_by and approved_at fields populated after approval. Admin orders table shows 'Approved By' column.

FIX4_vendor_order_visibility.details: GET /api/vendor/orders returns orders from vendor_orders collection with sales contact info (sales_name, sales_phone, sales_email). Shows 6 orders for demo partner.

FIX5_vendor_privacy_api.details: Vendor orders API response does NOT contain customer_name, customer_phone, or customer_email fields. Privacy protected.

FIX5_vendor_privacy_ui.details: Vendor orders table at /partner/orders does NOT show a Customer column. Table shows: Date, Vendor Order No, Source Type, Base Price, Status, Priority.

FIX6_dashboard_links_cleanup.details: CustomerPortalLayout.jsx navigation uses /account/* paths. /dashboard/* routes redirect to /account/*. No /dashboard/ links in active customer navigation.

FIX3_admin_ui_approved_by.details: Admin orders table shows 'Approved By' column header and displays approval info for each order.
